pattern: Digit-DP over string positions combined with KMP failure function to track progress toward the forbidden substring.
hints: Enumerate valid strings using digit DP: for each position track whether you are still bounded below by s1, bounded above by s2, and how far into the evil pattern you have matched.
Build the KMP failure function for evil; after placing each character at position i, use it to compute the new evil-match length without scanning from scratch.
State is (position, kmp_state, tight_lo, tight_hi); when kmp_state reaches len(evil) the string is invalid; memoize on (pos, kmp, tight_lo, tight_hi) and sum modulo 10^9+7.

edge_inputs.description: example 2: evil is prefix of all strings in range, answer 0
n=1, full alphabet minus one evil char
s1 == s2, check if that single string is good
s1 == s2 and that string contains evil
evil longer than n, all strings trivially good

stress.description: n=20 with random s1<=s2 and random evil of length 5
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import string
    n = size
    chars = string.ascii_lowercase
    s1 = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(n))
    s2 = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(n))
    if s1 > s2:
        s1, s2 = s2, s1
    evil = ''.join(rng.choice(chars) for _ in range(5))
    return [n, s1, s2, evil]
